reply_original:
Hi there! I'm sorry to hear that Fantasia didn't capture your interest. We are constantly working to improve our AI characters and features to make them more engaging.

If there is something specific you found boring or if you have suggestions on how we can improve, please let us know at support@fantachat.ai. We'd love to win you back!
reply_zh:
你好！很遗憾听到 Fantasia 没能吸引你的兴趣。我们一直在努力改进我们的 AI 角色和功能，使它们更具吸引力。

如果你觉得某些具体内容很无聊，或者对我们如何改进有任何建议，请通过 support@fantachat.ai 告诉我们。我们非常希望能重新赢回你的青睐！
